title: Fix live confidence gate rebreak so sub-0.60 signals cannot open after gate rejection
acceptance:
- No live bridge path can call open_position() for a signal rejected by check_entry_gates()
- Sub-0.60 signals cannot open after a confidence_too_low rejection in the same loop/runtime path
- Valid >=0.60 signals still proceed normally
- No files outside allowed scope are modified unless explicitly documented under conditional scope
- python -m py_compile bot_core.py passes
- If model_bridge.py is modified, python -m py_compile core/model_bridge.py passes
